prompt: Ultra-realistic portrait of a beautiful Korean woman seated confidently on top of a wooden classroom desk during late afternoon golden hour, captured in a cinematic film photography style. Camera positioned directly in front at a slight low angle. She sits poised on the desk facing the camera, feet resting on the desk's edge, knees together and angled slightly to one side. Both hands resting lightly on the desk surface beside her hips, torso upright with relaxed confidence. Expression direct and composed — eyes locked into the lens, jaw relaxed, lips softly closed with quiet self-assurance. Chin level, posture open and elegant. Wearing a delicate pink lace corset-style mini dress with thin spaghetti straps — the bodice featuring a sheer lace overlay with intricate floral embroidery, a crystal rhinestone brooch at the center chest, and a row of pearl embellishments lining the waistband. The skirt is layered pink tulle and organza, pleated and adorned with small 3D white floral appliqués, falling softly mid-thigh, the tulle catching and diffusing golden classroom light beautifully. Delicate silver chain bracelet on one wrist, thin silver necklace at the collarbone. White low-top sneakers. Long dark brown hair loose and natural, falling over both shoulders. Dewy glass skin, flushed cheeks, barely-there tinted lip, soft eye makeup. Canvas tote bag dropped casually on the desk beside her. Warm amber golden light flooding through tall classroom windows at a low angle, casting long shadows across the floor and desk surface. Dust motes floating in light beams. The pink tulle skirt glowing warmly, the lace bodice catching delicate rim highlights. Authentic Korean classroom setting — wooden desks, chalk-dusted green board with Korean writing, South Korean flag on the wall, old wall clock, stacked textbooks, worn polished flooring. 35mm analog film grain, Kodak Portra 400 — the pink of the dress harmonizing with warm honey tones of the Portra palette, muted greens, soft creams. Shallow depth of field, soft classroom bokeh behind her. Bold editorial fashion composition, cinematic still frame, hyper-realistic lace and tulle fabric texture, golden hour haze, quiet confident mood.
